subject: docs(migration): add frontend-to-backend migration guide
body:
Comprehensive guide covering every hook, auth context, and page change
needed when switching from localStorage mock data to Supabase backend.

Covers:
- Hook-by-hook migration with exact Supabase query replacements
- Auth migration from mock users to Google OAuth
- isCreator derivation change (global → per-project)
- Real-time subscription setup for two-party coordination
- Notification and signature log migration (frontend → backend-triggered)
- PDF verification hash migration (client → server)
- Error handling and loading state additions
- Offline queue strategy
- File-by-file cleanup checklist
- Two-browser testing checklist
- Recommended migration order (12 steps)

Tags: documentation, backend, migration, supabase
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: backend-migration
Semver: minor
